response.original_title: 1-830-745-0056 How to contact Uphold support? Tips for Efficient Support
response.overview: You can contact Uphold support by submitting a request through their Help Center or using the official contact page. Contact Methods 1.	Submit a Request via Help Center •	Visit the Uphold Help Center request page at https://support.uphold.com/hc/en-us/requests/new •	Log in to your Uphold account. •	Fill out the form with your issue details. You may need to verify your identity with a selfie or provide your phone number if updating 2FA or resetting your password. 2.	Official Contact Page •	Access Uphold’s contact resources  •	This page provides information about Uphold’s registered offices and compliance certifications, and links to support channels for account or transaction issues. 3.	Help Center Articles •	For common issues like linking payment methods, managing the Uphold Debit Card, or troubleshooting account access, the Help Center provides step-by-step guides. Tips for Efficient Support
response.title: 1-830-745-0056 How to contact Uphold support? Tips for Efficient Support
